history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, grainy, high-contrast, close-up portrait of a young woman lying down, with her head tilted back and her eyes partially closed. Her mouth is slightly open, and her tongue is visible. Her fingers, with long, sharp, pointed nails, are touching her lips. She is wearing a delicate necklace with small pendants. The lighting is dramatic, with strong shadows that obscure parts of her face and body. The background is dark and out of focus, creating a sense of intimacy and mystery. The overall mood is sensual and alluring. The style is reminiscent of vintage fashion photography or film noir.
